title: Plugin details view with an install button
summary: Browsing plugins in Settings now lets you click a plugin to open a details view — with its description, stats, requested permissions, and what it adds — and install it right from there.
highlights: Click any plugin card in Settings → Plugins → Browse to open its full details
The details view shows installs, stars, license, homepage, requested access, and contributions
Install straight from the details view, with the same capability-consent prompt as before
